metadata.focus_area: Maharashtra agriculture - COMPLETE DATA for hackathon
fixes_applied: ✅ 15 Mandi nodes with locations and crops
✅ Monthly weather data (temp + rainfall) for all villages
✅ Market trends for ALL 20 crops (not just 10)
✅ Current crop stage and sowing dates per farmer

government_schemes.name: PM-KISAN
government_schemes.eligibility: Small & marginal farmers (up to 2 hectares / 5 acres)

government_schemes.name: Crop Insurance (PMFBY)
government_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana - 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi

government_schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
government_schemes.description: Low-interest agricultural credit - 4% effective rate with interest subvention

government_schemes.name: Soil Health Card
government_schemes.description: Free soil testing and crop-specific fertilizer recommendations

government_schemes.name: Drip Irrigation Subsidy
government_schemes.description: 55% subsidy for small farmers, 45% for others on drip irrigation systems

government_schemes.name: Solar Pump Subsidy
government_schemes.description: 60% subsidy on solar pumps (up to 7.5 HP)
